target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive structural damage including collapsed roof sections, exposed internal framing, and widespread facade destruction; damage covers more than 45% of the visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive structural collapse with debris scattered across the ground; roof and upper floors are missing; facade is severely compromised; fire and smoke indicate ongoing destruction consistent with 75-100% damage.

summary: Two buildings are assessed: one with SEVERE damage (45%+ visible area affected) and another DESTROYED (75-100% damage). The overall scene depicts a large, multi-story building complex engulfed in fire and smoke, with extensive structural collapse, debris scattered across the ground, and visible fire spreading across multiple floors. The functional impact is likely catastrophic, with both assessed buildings rendered unusable and the surrounding area severely compromised.
